testcase.name: test_add_record_api_accepts_format
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_format_features.py:56: in test_add_record_api_accepts_format assert response.status_code in [200, 201, 400, 409] E assert 404 in [200, 201, 400, 409] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_format_features.py:145: in test_listings_api_accessible assert response.status_code in [200, 401, 403] E assert 404 in [200, 401, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
